title: forest+
description: this mod adds new biomes and new wood types. Each forest biome contains unique item(s) that can help you on your journey!
body:
**Welcome to forest+**

**Forest+** is a forest biome addon which comes with new forest types and wood types that may spice up your builds. Now this mod is not just forest biomes, each new forest biome comes with unique item(s) and maybe unique mobs soon. This mod is currently in development so expect bugs.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Current forests:
**Void Forest**

**_------- Void Forest -------_**
Contains:
Void ore (Mined to give void shards, can only be mined with an iron pickaxe or above)
Void shards can craft void blocks and void essence
Void logs which can craft void wood blocks
Mob spawns:
Creeper
Spider
Item Uses:
Void essence: eatable, gives some positive and some negative effects for 1:30

</details>
